patch.value: Decision: Re-audit final verification and system health summary
Final verification gate and decision record: build/typecheck/tests/security scan. Summarize system health, residual risks, next iteration backlog.
Full test suite green. Security scan clean. All child items closed with evidence. Decision record captures residual risks.

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: predecessor pm-dmam closed. Net-new for re-audit closeout.

patch.value:
Re-audit Decision Record:

SYSTEM HEALTH: All systems operational. No regressions found.

VERIFICATION GATES PASSED:
- Build + Typecheck: clean
- Test suite: 84 files, 1177 tests, all pass
- Security scan: zero findings
- Version policy: 2026.5.2 valid
- NPX smoke: pass
- Package: 415 files

FUNCTIONAL AREAS VERIFIED:
- CLI lifecycle: init/create/claim/update/comments/notes/learnings/files/close/release
- Output modes: TOON (default), JSON, quiet, help, contracts
- SDK: 70+ typed exports, 9 capability types, defineExtension helper
- Search: keyword 2.3s, semantic 2.1s, hybrid 2.0s (Ollama Qwen + LanceDB)
- Reindex: 668 items, keyword 1.6s, semantic 35s
- Calendar: agenda/week/month views, recurrence, filters, markdown format
- Telemetry: enabled by default, opt-out, scrubbing, retry, queue flush
- Sentry: PmCliError filtering, data scrubbing, DSN configured
- CI/CD: timeout-minutes, multi-OS/Node matrix, SHA-pinned actions, provenance

LIVE INFRASTRUCTURE:
- 9 Docker containers running (healthy)
- Telemetry API: 200 OK
- Grafana v11.6.14: database OK
- RabbitMQ: queue 0/0
- Postgres: 34981 events, 1367 unique installations
- Sentry: 0 unresolved issues, release tracked

RESIDUAL RISKS:
- command-aware.ts buildCommandAwareEnvelope is unused dead code (reserved for future)
- Historical pm item comments contain legacy host paths (redaction notes appended, history JSONL immutable)

NEXT ITERATION BACKLOG:
- Integrate command-aware output module into live CLI commands
- Consider search performance optimization for larger corpora
Full re-audit of pm-cli v2026.5.2 completed successfully. All 9 phases executed with verified evidence. System healthy.
All pm CLI features functional, no regressions, infrastructure healthy

84 test files, 1177 tests pass. Build/typecheck clean. Security scan zero findings. Telemetry stack healthy (34981 events, 1367 installs). Sentry 0 unresolved issues. SDK 70+ exports. Search 2s latency. Calendar all views working.

Full verification gate passed: build/typecheck/1177 tests/security scan/version policy/NPX smoke all clean. All 7 child workstream items closed with evidence. Decision record captures system health, residual risks, and next-iteration backlog.
